title: cyperus odoratus var. squarrosus
intro: Cyperus odoratus var. squarrosus, also known as the fragrant flat sedge, is a type of plant in the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cyperus odoratus var. squarrosus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
